## Summary

Describe the problem, the scoped change, and the linked issue.

## Validation

List the exact test commands and results.

## Checklist

- [ ] The complete test suite passes.
- [ ] No schema changes were made, or the approved design review is linked.
- [ ] No parser behavior changes were made, or the approved design review is linked.
- [ ] No official-source policy violations were introduced.
- [ ] No generated CSV or SQLite artifacts were added.
- [ ] No golden baseline changes were made unless explicitly approved and linked.
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed.
